message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "读者" as reader
actor "图书管理员" as librarian
rectangle "还书界面" as returnBookInterface
rectangle ":还书信息" as returnBookInfo
rectangle ":系统" as system

loop
  activate reader
  reader -> librarian : 1.取消预定
  activate librarian
  librarian -> returnBookInterface : 2.处理图书
  activate returnBookInterface
  returnBookInterface -> returnBookInfo : 3.获取图书信息
  activate returnBookInfo
  returnBookInfo --> returnBookInterface : 4.图书信息
  deactivate returnBookInfo
  returnBookInterface -> system : 5.删除预定记录
  activate system
  system --> system : 6.删除预定记录
  system --> returnBookInterface : 7.删除预定成功
  deactivate system
  returnBookInterface --> librarian : 8.处理图成功
  deactivate returnBookInterface
  librarian --> reader : 9.取消预定成功
  deactivate librarian
  deactivate reader
endloop

@enduml
